pages.title: Before caving
pages.text: $(l)心 → 明/脉 → 命 or 忍$()$(br2)心 gives margin. 明 and 脉 tell you whether the area is worth entering. 命 handles accidental lethal hits; 忍 handles burst damage.

pages.title: When surrounded
pages.text: Hold position: $(l)坚 + 稳$().$(br)Split burst: $(l)忍$().$(br)Clean debt: $(l)净$().$(br)Low-tier counter: $(l)力$(). Use $(l)怒$() only once you have diamond or above.

pages.title: After the fight
pages.text: If ink wound remains, write 净 or stand down with 息.$(br2)If you died and lost items, use 魄 near the recovery point. 魄 returns categories and counts, not a flat copy of the grave.
